positive: Minimalist abstract representation of a soaring mythical phoenix rising from stylized desert rock formations. The phoenix should be rendered in elegant, flowing contours with brilliant gold and crimson accents, contrasted against deep indigo and muted sage green. The overall style should be a modern graphic illustration, combining Art Deco geometric patterns with free-flowing, clean silhouettes. Strong rim lighting and high contrast are essential to emphasize the outlines. Central composition, symmetrical balance, designed for textile printing. Clean vector quality, smooth gradient transitions, detailed but non-cluttered, suitable for screen printing.
